# CAT(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  cat — concatenate and print files

## SYNOPSIS
  cat [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Print the contents of one or more files.

## OPTIONS
  -n  number output lines
  -A  show non-printing chars

## EXAMPLES
  cat /etc/passwd
  cat readme.txt
  cat file1 file2

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
